name: APP ISNT USED, PLAY NEW ONE ON PROFILE

reviews.review_description: This game is good, but there's an issue: there are no flashlights or anything to help you survive in the dark, so it's impossible to win. Also, I'm confused if this game is about surviving as long as possible or finding the exit, but there's no exit or anything past the pool rooms, which isn't good. And I want to know what's in the vent, but I can't reach it.

developer_response.body: Hello! We are sorry about the lack of updates. I have accidently deleted the keystore and I cant update this app. I will try to get it back.

reviews.review_title: THE BEST BACKROOMS GAME I PLAYED SO FAR
reviews.review_description: This is the best backrooms game I love but it just has no flashlight but I’ll play this with my friends

The game needs major updates and alot of map fixes the graphics looks decent but overal it has really good potential keep going and u will make it keep in MIND dont add MODS do it for the community not for the money anyways goodluck with ur journey.
This game is fun because the monsters are actually fast unlike other games.but codes aren't accessible rn but over all still 5 stars
its a fun and progressing game but there are bugs. Like holes in the floor that u fall out of. Overall a very fun game

Blasted with outlets fun trying to find an exit
